## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Amanda Mtuli's background and potential fit for a Content Manager role at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - growthx.ai has experienced rapid growth, scaling from \<20 accounts and \~$1M ARR to 40+ accounts and $6M+ ARR in a short time
  - [The company uses a pod structure led by managing editors, with content managers playing a crucial role in strategy and content production](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Amanda has diverse experience in PR, publishing, content writing, and marketing, with a strong focus on storytelling and brand/audience understanding](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [growthx.ai leverages AI workflows to produce high-volume, quality content (7-15 articles/week) for SEO-focused clients](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Growth and Structure

  - Rapid scaling: \<20 accounts to 40+ accounts, $1M ARR to $6M+ ARR
  - [Implemented pod structure: managing editor, multiple content managers, freelance writers](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Focus on balancing growth with quality and team success](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Content manager role: inform strategy, keyword research, content production using AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

### Amanda's Professional Background

  - [Diverse experience: PR, publishing, content writing, marketing](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Roles included junior account manager, features editor, content marketer](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Strong focus on storytelling, brand understanding, and audience engagement](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Experience with SEO, press releases, and content strategy for various industries](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)

### AI and Content Creation

  - [Amanda's interest in AI as a tool for efficiency and staying ahead in the industry](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Experience using AI for ideation, campaign planning, timelines, and budgeting](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [growthx.ai's use of AI workflows to produce high-volume, quality content](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Importance of human touch in refining and "humanizing" AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Content Strategy and Best Practices

  - [Amanda's approach: study competitors, optimize for SEO, incorporate human elements (testimonials, reviews)](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Focus on creating relatable, shareable content](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Importance of understanding analytics and audience behavior](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Balancing keyword usage with natural, engaging writing](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)

### Content Manager Day-to-Day

  - [Potential shift to managing fewer accounts (1-2) for deeper engagement](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Regular client calls for strategy alignment and problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Hands-on work with AI workflows to generate and refine content](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Collaboration with freelance writers to enhance content quality](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Iterative process of improving workflows and content output](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

## Next Steps

  - growthx.ai to follow up with Amanda regarding next steps in the hiring process
  - Amanda to consider any additional questions about the role or company
  - [growthx.ai to continue refining their onboarding process and enablement systems for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/wduuuoq62PxYfJ3njv_CGcBPxCHzAXPA?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
